# Anomaly Detection Report — 2024

## Agreement between ratio and z

Cross-tab of `flag_ratio` × `flag_z` (counts of hourly rows):

| flag_ratio   |   False |   True |
|:-------------|--------:|-------:|
| False        |   46958 |   2284 |
| True         |    2133 |   1329 |

- Ratio-only: **2133** flagged hours
- Z-only:     **2284** flagged hours
- Both:       **1329** flagged hours
